studentId.description: ID of the student who made the payment

transactionDate.description: Date and time of the transaction

lessonId.description: ID of the lesson being paid for (for additional lessons)

createdAt.description: Date and time when payment was created

lastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when payment was last modified

StudentRequest.description: Request DTO for creating or updating a student

PaymentRequest.description: Request DTO for processing a payment

studentId.description: ID of the student making the payment

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used (optional for pending payments)

lessonId.description: ID of the lesson being paid

PaymentStatusUpdateRequest.description: Request DTO for updating payment status

LessonRequest.description: Request DTO for creating or updating a lesson

studentId.description: ID of the student taking the lesson

courseId.description: ID of the course this lesson belongs to. If provided, instructorId, vehicleId, and type will be taken from the course.

endTime.description: Lesson end date and time. If not provided, will be calculated as startTime + 1 hour 30 minutes

VehicleRequest.description: Request DTO for creating or updating a vehicle

PaymentPendingRequest.description: Request DTO for creating a pending payment

studentId.description: ID of the student making the payment

lessonId.description: ID of the lesson being paid for (optional)

InstructorRequest.description: Request DTO for creating an instructor

uploadDate.description: Date and time when document was uploaded

studentId.description: ID of the student taking the lesson

instructorId.description: ID of the instructor teaching the lesson

vehicleId.description: ID of the vehicle used for the lesson

courseId.description: ID of the course this lesson belongs to (if part of a course)

createdAt.description: Date and time when lesson was created

description.example: Complete beginner course with 10 practical lessons

numberOfLessons.description: Number of lessons included in the course (configured)

instructorId.description: ID of the instructor assigned to this course

vehicleId.description: ID of the vehicle assigned to this course

createdAt.description: Date and time when course was created

lastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when course was last modified

registrationDate.description: Date and time when student was registered

lastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when student information was last modified

documents.description: List of documents associated with the student

CourseRequest.description: Request DTO for creating a course

description.example: Complete beginner course with 10 practical lessons

instructorId.description: ID of the instructor assigned to this course

vehicleId.description: ID of the vehicle assigned to this course

numberOfLessons.description: Number of lessons included in this course

createdAt.description: Date and time when vehicle was registered

lastModifiedDate.description: Date and time when vehicle information was last modified

tags.name: Student Management
tags.description: APIs for managing students, including registration, updates, document management, and search functionality

tags.name: Scheduling Management
tags.description: APIs for managing lessons and scheduling, including booking, rescheduling, cancellation, and finding available instructors

tags.name: Instructor Management
tags.description: APIs for managing instructors, including registration and retrieval

tags.name: Vehicle Management
tags.description: APIs for managing vehicles in the fleet, including registration, updates, status management, and availability checking

tags.name: Payment Management
tags.description: APIs for processing payments, retrieving payment history, and calculating student balances

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific lesson, including student, instructor, and vehicle details.

put.description: Updates lesson details, typically used for rescheduling. Validates new time slot availability.

400.description: Invalid input data

delete.description: Cancels a scheduled lesson. The lesson status will be updated to CANCELLED.

409.description: Cannot cancel lesson that has already started or completed

get.description: Retrieves a list of all vehicles in the fleet. Can be optionally filtered by status (AVAILABLE, IN_USE, MAINTENANCE, RETIRED).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by vehicle status (AVAILABLE, IN_USE, MAINTENANCE, RETIRED)

post.description: Creates a new vehicle in the fleet. Validates license plate uniqueness and insurance expiry date.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

409.description: Vehicle with this license plate already exists

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific instructor.
Retrieves all lessons for a specific student. Can be optionally filtered by status.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by lesson status (SCHEDULED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, NO_SHOW)

get.description: Retrieves all lessons scheduled for a specific instructor, including past and future lessons.

put.description: Processes a refund for a completed payment. Uses pessimistic locking to prevent concurrent refunds. Only completed payments can be refunded.

400.description: Payment cannot be refunded (invalid status or already refunded)

get.description: Searches for students by first name or last name. The search is case-insensitive and partial matches are supported.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name to search (first or last name)

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific vehicle, including status and insurance information.

put.description: Updates existing vehicle details. Can be used to update insurance expiry, status, or other vehicle information.

400.description: Invalid input data

post.description: Creates a new lesson booking. Validates instructor and vehicle availability, and checks for conflicts.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

409.description: Instructor or vehicle not available for the requested time slot

get.description: Retrieves all documents associated with a specific student, including their status and upload dates.

post.description: Uploads a document for a student. Supported document types include ID_CARD, DRIVING_LICENSE, MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE, etc.

parameters.name: documentType
parameters.description: Type of document (ID_CARD, DRIVING_LICENSE, MEDICAL_CERTIFICATE, etc.)

400.description: Invalid document type or file path

get.description: Retrieves a list of all instructors in the system.

post.description: Creates a new instructor with the provided information. Validates license number and email uniqueness.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

409.description: Instructor with this license number or email already exists

get.description: Retrieves all available courses. Can be filtered by instructorId and/or vehicleId.

post.description: Creates a new course with specified instructor, vehicle, number of lessons, and price.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

get.description: Retrieves all lessons associated with a specific course.
Checks if an instructor is available for a specific time slot by verifying lesson conflicts.

400.description: Invalid date/time format

put.description: Changes the vehicle status to MAINTENANCE and creates a maintenance entry. The vehicle will not be available for booking until it is returned to service.

400.description: Vehicle is already in maintenance

get.description: Checks if a vehicle is available for a specific time slot by verifying lesson conflicts.

400.description: Invalid date/time format or missing required parameters

get.description: Retrieves all instructors with a specific specialization.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific course.

put.description: Updates the details of an existing course.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

delete.description: Deletes a course by its ID. Cannot delete courses that have lessons.

409.description: Cannot delete course with existing lessons

get.description: Retrieves all payment transactions for a specific student, ordered by transaction date (newest first). Optionally filter by payment status.
Finds all vehicles with AVAILABLE status that have no scheduled lessons in the specified time slot. Checks for conflicts in the given time interval.

400.description: Invalid date/time format or missing required parameters

get.description: Calculates the total balance (sum of all payments) for a student. Returns the total amount paid.

put.description: Changes the vehicle status back to AVAILABLE after maintenance is completed. The vehicle will be available for booking again.

400.description: Vehicle is not in maintenance

get.description: Retrieves a list of all students. Can be optionally filtered by status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by student status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED)

post.description: Creates a new student with the provided information. Validates CNP, email, and phone number.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

409.description: Student with this CNP or email already exists

post.description: Creates a pending payment for a lesson that requires payment. Used when booking additional lessons outside of a course. Requires studentId and amount.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

get.description: Retrieves all lessons associated with a specific course.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific payment, including status, amount, and payment method.
Retrieves detailed information about a student by their unique identifier

put.description: Updates existing student details. All fields are validated.

400.description: Invalid input data

delete.description: Permanently deletes a student from the system. This action cannot be undone.

409.description: Cannot delete student with active lessons or payments

get.description: Retrieves all lessons within a specific date range.

400.description: Invalid date/time format

get.description: Retrieves all upcoming (future) lessons for a specific student.

put.description: Updates the status of a payment. Uses pessimistic locking to prevent concurrent status updates. Refunded payments cannot have their status changed.

400.description: Invalid status change (e.g., trying to change refunded payment)

put.description: Processes a payment for a student. If a PENDING payment exists for the specified lessonId (or matching studentId and amount), it will be updated to COMPLETED. Otherwise, a new payment will be created. Validates payment amount and method.

400.description: Invalid input data or validation failed

get.description: Finds all instructors who are available for a specific time slot. Checks for existing lesson conflicts.

400.description: Invalid date/time format

info.title: Driving School Management System API
info.description: Combined API documentation for all microservices in the Driving School Management System. All endpoints are accessible through the API Gateway.
